div.span: We refer to your candidature and to our discussions. We are pleased to offer you an appointment in our organization. Welcome onboard as a VSTian!

Your designation will be
–
. Your base location will be
unless notified otherwise.

Your CTC will be
/- Per Annum, the detailed Compensation package offered to you are given in Annexure A.
The documentation necessary at the time of your joining is listed
in Annexure B. We look forward to having you on-board on or

Please convey your acceptance of this offer within 3 days of receiving this offer. This offer will stand automatically withdrawn if we do not hear from you within those 3 days or your failure to report for joining on
as the case may be.
If you are in project, you will be on days of notice as per the company policy.
We welcome you to Vriksham Soft Tech and looking forward to a long and mutually rewarding association with you.
We wish you success in your future endeavors.

div.p: At the time of joining, you are requested to bring the following documents in original, along with one copy each.

ul.li:
Certificates supporting your educational qualifications along with mark sheets
Std X Certificate and mark sheet
Std XII Certificate and mark sheet
Degree Certificate and Semester-wise / Year-wise mark sheets
Master’s Degree Certificate and Semester-wise / Year-wise mark sheets
Diploma / PG Diploma Certificate and Transcripts
Any other Certificates with supporting documents, if any
Your latest salary slip / Salary Certificate
Your relieving letter / Service Certificate from the last three employers
Acknowledged copy of our offer of appointment
4 passport sized colour photographs with white background
Valid government ID proof for your current / permanent address

div.p: Please bring all the Certificates supporting your educational qualifications along with mark sheets in original for verification only.

div.span: We refer to your candidature and to our discussions. We are pleased to offer you an appointment in our organization. Welcome onboard as a VSTian!

Your designation will be
–
. Your base location will be
unless notified otherwise.

ol.li:
Appointment
Your date of appointment is effective from the date of joining
. Please carefully review this offer of employment before agreeing to its terms by signing it. The offer outlines important benefits, terms, and conditions related to your employment with Vriksham Soft Tech. Kindly send your acceptance of this offer via return email. Your joining date may be extended based on your written request, subject to the sole discretion of the Company. The Company reserves the right to extend your date of joining due to changes in business requirements, at its sole discretion. This offer will expire if the Company does not receive your written acceptance of this offer letter or if you fail to join the company on the agreed-upon date. Please indicate your acceptance of this offer by signing below and returning it to HR by email within 5 days.

Your fixed base pay (FBP), on an annualized basis, will be INR
, inclusive of employer PF contributions, and will be paid in accordance with the Company’s regular payroll process and procedures during your employment. This amount will be subject to all applicable withholdings.

The breakdown of your fixed base pays into basic salary, allowances, benefits, and perquisites (collectively referred to as “compensation” or “salary”) is provided in Annexure I to this letter. You will be governed by the policies, rules, and procedures of the Company regarding such compensation. The Company reserves the right to modify the structure, amount, eligibility, and terms of such compensation at its discretion.
Your compensation will be subject to periodic review in accordance with Company policy.

Changes to your compensation are discretionary and will be based on effective performance, results during the period, and other relevant criteria. You understand that information regarding your compensation is strictly confidential, and therefore, we kindly request you to maintain confidentiality.
Your compensation will be subject to deductions for all governmental and local taxes, contributions, etc., in accordance with applicable laws, including taxes on the value of perquisites.

Probation
You will undergo a probationary period of six months starting from the date of your appointment, which the Company reserves the right to extend at its sole discretion. Confirmation of your services at the end of the probationary period will be provided by the Company in writing.
Your standard working days are Monday to Friday. You may be scheduled to work shifts in accordance with the Company’s shift policy and customer requirements.
The Company retains the right to request that you work beyond your normal working hours, as needed, to fulfill your duties.

These entitlements shall cease upon the termination of your employment with VST. They may also cease if you need to take a long-term personal leave of absence. Please consult with your HR team for further details

Considering your position and role within the company, it is imperative that you perform all responsibilities effectively, diligently, and to the best of your ability. You are expected to devote your entire working time, abilities, and efforts to these responsibilities, ensuring satisfactory results.

Throughout your employment, you are prohibited from engaging in any activities or investments that conflict with the interests of the Company. Additionally, you must refrain from activities that distract you from performing your responsibilities properly and efficiently or interfere with your ability to exercise independent judgment in the best interests of the Company.

It is essential that you adhere to the Company’s policies, which are an integral part of your employment terms. Therefore, you are required to understand the scope and purpose of these policies and to comply with them accordingly. These policies are subject to periodic updates and modifications, and new policies may be introduced as needed. The Company will inform you of any changes, and you will be expected to adhere to them.

If you require an employment visa to work in India, this appointment will not take effect until you have obtained the necessary employment visa. If granted, your employment will be subject to the terms outlined in the visa issued by the Indian Government.

If your employment visa is not extended within the validity period of the initial visa, your employment will automatically terminate on the last day of the initial visa period without further notice. You agree to promptly inform the Company if your employment visa extension is not granted.

li.strong: Confidential information, Nondisclosure Agreement, Conflict of Interest and Non-competition Agreement

ol.li: VST expects that, during and after the term of your employment, you will not disclose to third parties, utilize for your own benefit, or otherwise make use of any of VST trade secrets or other confidential or proprietary information concerning VST, except to the extent necessary to carry out your obligations to VST.

Please sign and return the enclosed Confidential Information, Non-Disclosure, Conflict of Interest, and Non-Competition Agreement. This agreement contains, among others, your promise not to recruit any employees of VST or its clients and contractors for a period of one year following the termination of your employment relationship with VST. Additionally, you agree not to compete with VST for a period of six months following the termination of your employment relationship with VST.

By signing this letter, you represent that your acceptance of this offer and your employment with VST does not and will not violate or otherwise conflict with any other agreement to which you may be a party.

You also agree not to undertake employment, whether full-time or part-time, as the Director/Partner/Member/Employee of any other organization/entity engaged in any form of business activity without the consent of VST.

You agree to promptly surrender, disclose, and assign upon demand to VST or its successors, designers, or assigns, any inventions, creations, computer programs, training materials, or other works that you may develop or assist in developing during your employment with VST.
You acknowledge that such inventions, creations, computer programs, training materials, or other works, and all rights pertaining to them, are works for hire and the sole property of VST.
You further agree to grant and relinquish all rights or interests you may have in such creations, inventions, or works.

Moreover, you authorize VST, on your behalf, to sign any necessary papers and to take any actions deemed necessary or desirable by VST to secure rights relating to such inventions, creations, computer programs, training materials, or works, including but not limited to patents and copyrights in India or any foreign countries.

Additionally, you agree to perform, during or after your employment, any further acts that are reasonable and necessary or desirable to transfer, perfect, or defend the Company's or its designee's ownership of the Employee Works, as reasonably requested by the Company.

You agree that for a period of one year following the cessation of your employment with the Company, you will not solicit, induce, or attempt to induce any employee of the Company, directly or indirectly, to terminate their employment with the Company and become self-employed or employed elsewhere.
You acknowledge that this restriction is necessary and reasonable for protecting the Company’s business interests.

All notes, records, books, documents, equipment, laptops, or parts of PCs belonging to the Company, whether created by you or provided to you during your employment, and containing confidential information (as defined herein), shall always remain the property of the Company.
These items must be promptly returned to the Company upon your cessation of employment or at any other time upon the Company's request.
Additionally, you agree to return any credit cards, identification cards, laptops, or other Company property or equipment immediately upon termination of your employment.

Right of Set-Off
If you incur any debt to the Company or if any money is owed to the Company by you (including overpayments made to you) for any reason, including but not limited to unpaid card expenses, phone bills, or misuse or misappropriation of the Company’s assets, the Company reserves the right to set off such outstanding amount from any amount due and payable to you.

Notice of Change
Any updates to your personal information, such as residential address, marital status, number of children, and educational qualifications, must be provided to the Company in writing within 7 days. Any notices intended for you will be considered properly delivered if given to you personally or sent by post to your last recorded address in the Company’s records.
You are informed that the Company collects your personal data for payroll, career management processes, administrative staff management, and work organization purposes.
For further details regarding the processing of personal data by the Company, refer to the provided information.

You acknowledge that, in the course of your employment with the Company, you may access certain information, including personal data as defined by applicable laws. This may include details such as name, address, email address, identity number, or any other information that could directly or indirectly identify an employee, client, service provider, or any other individual whose personal data is collected by the Company.
You agree to process personal data that you have access to during your employment strictly in accordance with the Company’s directives and solely for the purpose of fulfilling your work duties.
You commit to maintaining the confidentiality and security of any data you always access and processing the data in compliance with applicable laws and the Security Policies adopted by the Company.
You undertake not to utilize personal data for any purpose other than what is necessary to fulfill your responsibilities as an employee of the Company.

You agree to work exclusively for the Company within the context of the defined responsibilities and refrain from accepting or engaging in any other paid or unpaid employment or consulting, even temporarily.

You represent and warrant to the Company that:
a. You are not subject to any covenants, agreements, or restrictions, including those arising from prior employments or independent contractor relationships, which would be breached by executing this Agreement or performing your duties herein.
b. You will not bring onto the Company’s premises, use, or incorporate any unpublished documents or property belonging to past employers without their written consent.
c. There is no court order or other authority disqualifying you for appointment under this agreement.
The jurisdiction regarding your current employment will exclusively lie with the courts in New Delhi, which you undertake not to contest.
The appointment will be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of India.

This Agreement, including the referenced policies and other documents, constitutes the entire agreement between you and the Company regarding the subject matter herein. It cannot be modified, except as expressly stated herein, without an amendment signed by both parties.
If a court declares any provision void, that provision will be severed from this Agreement, and the remaining provisions shall remain fully enforceable.

Termination of Employment
You are entitled to receive from the Company and required to give the Company the following period of notice, in writing, to terminate your employment without cause, such notice, in each case, to expire as stated below:
During the probation period, either party may terminate this contract by giving Thirty days’ notice in writing or payment in lieu of salary (net of provident fund contribution and gratuity). However, the Company reserves the right not to accept payment in lieu of notice and at its sole discretion and enforce the notice period.
After your probation period, either party may terminate this contract by giving Ninety days’ notice in writing or payment in lieu of salary (net of provident fund contribution and gratuity). However, the Company reserves the right not to accept payment in lieu of notice and at its sole discretion and enforce the notice period.
a. In any event (unless mutually agreed in writing), your employment will automatically end upon reaching the Company’s retirement age. The retirement age for a full-time employee is 58 years.
b. Your employment is liable to be terminated immediately by the Company without prior notice if any information provided by you in your employment verification form or in connection with your appointment is found to be false, or if any material particulars are suppressed.
c. Furthermore, the Company reserves the right to terminate your services without notice or salary in lieu thereof for misconduct, negligence of duty, disloyalty, dishonesty, indiscipline, disobedience, irregular attendance, prolonged absence from duty due to ill-health, infirmity, accident, or inefficiency compared to other employees.
d. The Company may also terminate your employment immediately and without notice if you (i) commit a crime involving moral turpitude, theft, fraud, or deceit; (ii) engage in conduct that adversely affects the Company’s reputation; or (iii) exhibit conduct unbecoming of your position.
e. If you are absent without leave or remain absent beyond the granted or extended leave period, you shall be considered to have voluntarily terminated your employment without notice unless you:
f. Return to work within 3 days of the start of such absence; and
g. Provide a written explanation satisfactory to your manager regarding the absence.

li.ol: This offer is contingent upon obtaining no adverse information during reference checks with your previous employer(s), background check, and validation of the experience and educational qualifications you have submitted.

ol.li:
General
You agree that the provisions of this letter are severable. If any portion thereof is declared unenforceable, it shall not affect the enforceability of all other provisions herein. The intent of the parties is that if any part of this letter contains provisions deemed unreasonable, a court shall determine the terms of such agreement or enforce the terms deemed reasonable.

div.p: By accepting this offer of employment, you affirm that you have not signed any agreements with prior employers, or otherwise, that would restrict your ability to: (a) work for a competitor; (b) solicit customers; (c) recruit employees; or (d) perform the responsibilities of the position outlined in this offer letter. If you discover any such agreements, you must notify us immediately. You also affirm that you have not taken nor are in possession of any confidential and/or proprietary information belonging to prior employers.

You will be required to sign certain mandatory agreements, including but not limited to the Confidentiality Agreement, Intellectual Property Rights Agreement, and the Code of Business Ethics. Your employment will be governed by all rules and regulations, as amended from time to time. Additionally, the Company has various human resources and administration policies and procedures, which may be subject to change at any time at the Company's discretion. While these policies are not part of your contract of employment, you are required to comply with all applicable policies.
We are pleased to welcome you to our Company and look forward to a mutually beneficial association.

I have carefully read and understood the terms and conditions mentioned above. I accept all the terms and conditions of this offer of employment. I shall commence employment with effect from
.
At the time of joining, you are requested to bring the following documents in original, along with one copy each.

ul.li:
Certificates supporting your educational qualifications along with mark sheets
Std X Certificate and mark sheet
Std XII Certificate and mark sheet
Degree Certificate and Semester-wise / Year-wise mark sheets
Master’s Degree Certificate and Semester-wise / Year-wise mark sheets
Diploma / PG Diploma Certificate and Transcripts
Any other Certificates with supporting documents, if any
Your latest salary slip / Salary Certificate
Your relieving letter / Service Certificate from the last three employers
Acknowledged copy of our offer of appointment
4 passport sized colour photographs with white background
Valid government ID proof for your current / permanent address

div.p: Please bring all the Certificates supporting your educational qualifications along with mark sheets in original for verification only.

t.t-value: o.x_offer_letter_contract if 'x_offer_letter_contract' in o._fields else (o.contract_id if 'contract_id' in o._fields else False)
o.x_date_of_joining if 'x_date_of_joining' in o._fields else (contract.date_start if contract and 'date_start' in contract._fields else False)
contract.wage*12 if contract and contract.wage else 0
year_wage - variable - employer_pf - health-basic - hra - project
contract.resource_calendar_id.id if contract and contract.resource_calendar_id else (o.resource_calendar_id.id if o.resource_calendar_id else False)
